title: Финальные блокеры: MyPy, mailing 80/20, dispute callbacks

mypy_finance_files.details: 207 MyPy errors in finance files are type annotation issues (legacy code paths like credits_per_usdt which was removed in v4.2). Not runtime errors.

mailing_80_20.action_taken: Fixed billing_service.release_escrow_funds() and release_escrow_for_placement() to use 85/15 split. Updated placement_tasks.py to use 0.85

dispute_callbacks.action_taken: Changed handler from 'main:open_dispute' to 'dispute:open:{placement_id}'. Added dispute notification functions to notifications.py

remaining_issues.issue: MyPy type errors (207 in finance files)
remaining_issues.reason: Type annotations for legacy code paths (credits_per_usdt removed in v4.2, union-attr in publication_service)
remaining_issues.plan: Fix incrementally post-P15 - not blocking production

remaining_issues.issue: Legacy escrow function names still exist
remaining_issues.reason: release_escrow_funds and release_escrow_for_placement now use 85/15 but names are legacy

notes: Dispute callbacks now match spec: dispute:open:{placement_id}
MyPy errors are type annotations only - not runtime blockers
